reviews.comment:
No tiene indicación x dónde entrar,no somos de mar del plata x ende no sabíamos,depende de dónde venís tenés q dar toda la vuelta para entrar

(Translated by Google)
There are no signs indicating where to enter; we're not from Mar del Plata, so we didn't know. Depending on where you're coming from, you might have to go all the way around to get in.

reviews.comment:
Hola en realidad el servicio que brinda el ACA, es excelente en todas las áreas,recomendable,muy profesionales ,responsabilidad y buena predisposición de su grupo de gente que junto a la amabilidad y cordialidad hace a la confianza del asociado

(Translated by Google)
Hello, the service provided by ACA is truly excellent in all areas. Highly recommended. They are very professional, responsible, and their team is very helpful, which, along with their kindness and friendliness, fosters trust among members.

reviews.comment:
Mala atención de los playeros,hace 30 años que soy socio, tengo la app digital como no podía mostrar el carnet porque supuestamente no había señal me negaron hasta la ficha para el agua caliente,ni siquiera como mi DNI quisieron atender

(Translated by Google)
Bad service from the beach attendants. I've been a member for 30 years. I have the digital app. Since I couldn't show my card because there was supposedly no signal, they even refused to give me a token for hot water. They didn't even want to help me with my ID.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKdmQtRmxRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malísima la atencion de la gente del café y los playeros . Tienen los baños cerrados y no te dejan entrar . Le pedimos porfavor al playero y no nos quiso abrir el baño . Muy mal servicio

(Translated by Google)
The service from the cafe staff and the beach attendants was terrible. The restrooms were locked and they wouldn't let us in. We politely asked the attendant, but he refused to open the restroom for us. Very poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKemJpcnVnRRAB
